basic_details.job_title: North Bastar Kanker District Guest Lecturer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: North Bastar Kanker District Guest Lecturer Notification 2026 has been released on the official website. A total of 01 vacancy has been announced through the North Bastar Kanker District Guest Lecturer Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: Not specified. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: High School or equivalent, NCVT/SCVT National Trade Certificate or National Apprenticeship Certificate or State Trade Certificate, Diploma/Degree in Electrical Engineering or equivalent, CTI/ATI/NBTI/RBTI/TOT (preferred)
qualification.details: High School or equivalent from recognized board. NCVT/SCVT National Trade Certificate or National Apprenticeship Certificate or State Trade Certificate. Diploma/Degree in Electrical Engineering or equivalent from recognized university/board. CTI/ATI/NBTI/RBTI/TOT from DGT institutes is preferred.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 140 per hour (max 5 hours per day, max Rs. 15000 per month)
salary_details.details: Rs. 140 per hour (maximum 5 hours per day) Maximum monthly salary: Rs. 15000

selection_process: Merit List based on marks in technical qualification (CTI/ATI preferred)
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download North Bastar Kanker District Guest Lecturer Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Guest Lecturer post?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Guest Lecturer post in North Bastar Kanker District is 22nd June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Guest Lecturer post is 18 years. There is no upper age limit specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for the Guest Lecturer position?
faq.answer: The Guest Lecturer will be paid Rs. 140 per hour, with a maximum of 5 hours per day, leading to a maximum monthly salary of Rs. 15000.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications for the Guest Lecturer post?
faq.answer: Candidates need High School or equivalent, a Trade Certificate (NCVT/SCVT), and a Diploma/Degree in Electrical Engineering. CTI/ATI/NBTI/RBTI/TOT is preferred.

faq.question: Q6. How will the candidates be selected for the Guest Lecturer post?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a merit list prepared from the marks obtained in the technical qualification. Preference will be given to candidates with CTI/ATI qualifications.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the North Bastar Kanker District Guest Lecturer recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Guest Lecturer post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Guest Lecturer post (Electrician) in North Bastar Kanker District.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of North Bastar Kanker District. Links are provided in the 'Important Links' section.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Guest Lecturer positions are on a contractual basis. This means the employment is for a fixed term as per the terms of the contract.
